overview.all_time_stats: 75 conference championships and 47 NCAA postseason appearances when joining MVC in 2022
overview.note: Men's tennis competes in MAC (Mid-American Conference), not MVC

mens.venue: Curtis Granderson Stadium, 901 W Roosevelt Rd
mens.notes: Stadium named for UIC legend and MLB star Curtis Granderson. Program has 13 Horizon League championships.

mens.venue: Credit Union 1 Arena (formerly UIC Pavilion), 525 S Racine Ave
mens.notes: Renamed from UIC Pavilion in November 2018. Main rivalry: Loyola Chicago (31-30 all-time edge for UIC as of 2023).

mens.sport: Men's Cross Country / Track and Field
mens.notes: 53 new school records and 244 top-10 all-time performances under Zavala.
Rebuilt in 2022. Grass pitch, new video board, Chicago skyline views.

mens.venue: Flames Natatorium, inside Physical Education Building, 901 W Roosevelt Rd
Flames Outdoor Tennis Courts (6 lighted hard courts, 100+ seating) and XS Tennis Village
mens.notes: Eldin Nokic named MAC Freshman of the Year 2024-2025.

womens.venue: Credit Union 1 Arena, 525 S Racine Ave
womens.notes: Bracey won 2023-2024 IBCA Women's NCAA Division I Co-Coach of the Year — first Flames coach to win that award.

womens.sport: Women's Cross Country / Track and Field

womens.notes: Finished 2nd at 2024 MVC Championship — best in program history. Ended season ranked #165 nationally — also a program best.
WON 2025 MVC Tournament Championship — first conference title in program history. Made first-ever NCAA tournament appearance in 2025.

womens.venue: Flames Field softball complex, 901 W Roosevelt Rd
womens.notes: 1994 team reached Women's College World Series (56-19-1 season). 1999 team went 67-17, tying NCAA record for wins.
Program-record 14 athletes sent to CSCAA National Invitational Championships after 2024-2025 season. Harrison Nolan named 2025 MVC Diver of the Year.
19 conference championships and 17 NCAA tournament appearances since 1996. Dominant run of league titles 1997-2013.

womens.venue: Flames Athletic Center and Credit Union 1 Arena

flames_field.name: Flames Field
flames_field.notes: Soccer venue rebuilt 2022 with new scoreboard, video board, grandstand

flames_natatorium.name: Flames Natatorium
flames_natatorium.address: Inside Physical Education Building, 901 W Roosevelt Rd

tickets_and_students.student_admission: FREE to all regular season home athletics events with valid UIC student ID

fall_sports_pricing.flames_fast_pass: $50 — covers all home athletics events except basketball for the full academic year

basketball_tickets.purchase: Ticketmaster, UICFlames.com/Tickets, or ticket office at 312-413-UIC1

rivalries: Loyola Chicago — primary crosstown rival, especially in basketball. Nearly 50-year rivalry.
Bradley, Illinois State, Southern Illinois — designated in-state MVC basketball rivalry games

recent_results_2025_2026.mens_basketball: Reached 2026 MVC title game (Arch Madness). Beat Murray State 92-79 in quarters, Drake 72-51 in semis, lost to Northern Iowa 84-69 in final. Best conference tournament run since 2020.
recent_results_2025_2026.womens_basketball: Finished 14-17, 9-11 MVC. No. 7 seed, lost to Evansville 76-71 in opening round.
recent_results_2025_2026.womens_soccer: WON 2025 MVC Tournament Championship — first in program history. Made first-ever NCAA tournament appearance. 4 players on MVC All-Conference Team.
recent_results_2025_2026.mens_tennis: Competing in MAC. Fell to Ball State 4-3 on March 12, 2026.
recent_results_2025_2026.womens_golf: Best conference finish in program history (2nd at 2024 MVC Championship).
